titleStmt.title: SII 41.240: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 240. (A.R. No. 459 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: The king granted, 10 vēli of land, a tax-free dēvadāna in the village of Maṇavil in Maṇavilnāḍu, a sub-division of Maṇavir-kōṭṭam. The royal secretry Mīṉavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ wrote the royal order. Kūḻapiḍāraṉ is said to have requested the king for the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalaippa
ḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūrttiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil tevakanmi koyiṟkaṇakkaṉukkum śrīmāhe
śvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Ittevarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu nāḷ 3 10 3 mutal veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku
Iṟuppatāka maṇaviṟ koṭṭattu maṇavil nāṭṭu maṇavilile patiṟṟu velinilam Āṟāvatu mutal tevatāṉa
Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilārum varikkūṟuceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari potakkāṭṭac coṉṉom
Iṉnilam Āṟāvatu mutal Ittevarkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu nivantam celuttappa
ṇṇuka .. Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraōlai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Ivai maḻavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ciṅkaḷarā
yaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaiyirātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai coḻarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai villavarājaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Ivvūriṭuvittāṉ kūḻappiṭāraṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 41.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
